name: Roast Beef Spirals
recipeIngredient: 2 packages cream cheese, 8 ounces each, softened
6 slices roast beef, cut to a thickness of 1/4 inch
9 quartered canned spiced crab apples, well drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the filling by combining the cream cheese, garlic, and ginger in a blender.
2. Spread the filling generously and evenly on the roast beef slices.
3. Roll the slices lengthwise to encase the filling.
4. Wrap the rolls tightly in foil and place them in the freezer for 30 minutes.
5. Remove the rolls from the freezer and cut them into 1-inch-wide slices, creating a spiral design.
6. Garnish each slice with a quartered crab apple attached with a cellophane-tipped toothpick.
7. Serve. Makes about 36 pieces.
Do-Ahead Note: Prepare the rolls up to one day in advance and freeze them. Two hours before serving, remove from the freezer, cut, garnish, and allow to stand at room temperature until serving time.
